summary: V3 SNIPER.SOL: 12/12 new backend tests PASSED (bankroll GET/PUT/reset, buy deducts bankroll + source tag, insufficient balance rejection 400, close credits bankroll, partial-close tp1 adds tp_hits + reduces tokens_remaining without closing, portfolio/stats new fields bankroll_sol/initial_sol/daily_pnl_sol/daily_pnl_pct/by_source/auto_snipe_locked, trade-log, engine/status, PUT /settings with auto-snipe permissive rules produced auto_snipe_buy event within ~35s and positions with source=auto_snipe, disable auto_snipe stops). Full pytest (29 tests) all green. Frontend: paper-trading-banner, bankroll-chip ('Bankroll 10.000 SOL +0.000'), auto-snipe-toggle (flips OFF→ARMED→OFF via PUT /api/settings), engine-events-strip shows live 'AUTO-SNIPED $Oilland @ 0.00062230 · SCORE 90' event. Settings page renders all 4 new sections (Auto-Snipe Engine, Auto-Sell Ladder, Risk Limits, Trading Defaults) + Alert Rules, with toggles auto-snipe-enabled-toggle / auto-sell-enabled-toggle and save buttons save-snipe-rules / save-sell-rules / save-risk-limits all present.

ui_bugs.issue: VIRTUAL BANKROLL panel renders 5 BigStat cards correctly (Balance / Realized / Daily / Win Rate / Open) but the container lacks data-testid='bankroll-panel' and individual stat cards lack data-testid='stat-balance' / 'stat-realized' / 'stat-daily' / 'stat-winrate' / 'stat-open'. Functionally works; just testability gap.
SELL button is rendered with data-testid='close-position-{id}' (not a generic 'sell-button'). Only appears when p.status==='open'. Works correctly — just no generic selector.
Console warning 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on /app/portfolio when positions list is empty — ResponsiveContainer has no minHeight. Cosmetic only.

action_items: Optional: add data-testid='bankroll-panel' on the VIRTUAL BANKROLL container and data-testid on each BigStat card (stat-balance, stat-realized, stat-daily, stat-winrate, stat-open) for stable testing
Optional: add data-testid='sell-button-{id}' alias (in addition to close-position-{id}) to match the review checklist naming
Optional: set minHeight on Recharts ResponsiveContainer on Portfolio chart to avoid width(-1) warning when series is short
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1281 lines — past the 700-line threshold. Consider extracting into /app/backend/routers/{tokens,kols,portfolio,bankroll,alerts,settings,engine}.py and /app/backend/services/{dexscreener,scoring,engine_snipe,engine_sell}.py. Auto-loops can move to a background_tasks module.
check_risk_limits ignores max_position_pct entirely (always 'pass') — the 50x headroom comment is misleading; either enforce the cap or remove the dead branch.
SOL_PRICE_USD = 180.0 is hardcoded in 3 places (buy/close/partial-close) — fine for paper sim, but flag as TODO for live price feed.

auto_sell_loop calls partial_close() with an ephemeral PartialCloseRequest inside a nested async function (exec_partial); works but couples route handler to background task. Better: extract a pure _apply_partial_close(position_id, sell_pct, price, tag) used by both route and loop.
bankroll_get performs a daily reset inside a read path — OK but races under concurrent calls. Consider a dedicated midnight cron/scheduler.
No pagination on /api/portfolio/positions or /api/portfolio/trade-log (to_list(500)) — fine for MVP, document limit.

success_rate.frontend: ~92% (all critical testids present; 5 BigStat testids missing, SELL alias naming)

seed_data_creation: Tests reset bankroll at start and end; final state is clean (balance_sol=10, no open positions, auto_snipe_enabled=false). Settings were persisted with auto_snipe_enabled=false after test. Some closed positions from earlier iterations remain in trade-log (historical).
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 engine works end-to-end: enabling auto_snipe with permissive rules (min_score=70, min_liq=5000, max_age=2000) produces auto_snipe_buy events in <10s and creates positions with source='auto_snipe'. Always DISABLE auto_snipe and RESET bankroll at the end of any test run to keep subsequent iterations deterministic. Auto-sell ladder tests would require either mocking DexScreener price or waiting for a real token to hit tp1/sl — not tested in this iteration; recommend mocking SOL_PRICE_USD and price fetch if deeper auto-sell verification is needed.
rca of the issue: No bugs; all review items verified.
